mnemonics: F.A.I.R. AI: Focus on Fairness, Accountability, Inclusivity, and Responsibility to design AI for Social Good.
keyPoints: Define 'Social Good' clearly with measurable objectives from the start.
Ensure diverse stakeholder participation throughout the design process.
Implement rigorous testing for biases and unintended negative consequences.
commonMistakes: Assuming technical efficiency alone equates to social benefit.
Neglecting to plan for long-term maintenance and ethical oversight.
Designing for a hypothetical 'average' user instead of for edge cases and vulnerable populations.
